roa.docketEntryComment: PET & ORDER TO SUSP FEE PER SFBOS 180132 SIGNED AND FILED

/CAL:SENTENCE/AJW/CH1:SP 5Y:U:ESS:PROB 3 Y:PJ 24D/CTS:24/DNACOMP/STATES/WS/11590/DTC/LF/RX/VF4:200/PC/PSR/BKFEE/PF500/DEF:TO COMPLETE DRUG TREATMENT PROGRAM THRU MISSION COUNSEL/PROBFINE/SECFEE/ICNA/COLLECT/PAD/OBEY/ACCEP/SATERM/
/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF G/DEFT ADV RTS:1/ARBUCKLE/FNDG/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/PRES:11-09-09/CONTD:SENTENCE/DOP/BE/OR/

/CAL:ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE METRO PCS SUBPOENAED RECORDS/X: DEFENSE ORDERTO SHOW CAUSE MOTION IS WITHDRAWN AS THE SUBPOENAED RECORDS HAVE ARRIVED,//CONTD: EARLY RESOLUTION PROGRAM ON 09-25-09/CONTD PRELIM HRG, DOP/CONTD: PRELIMINARY HEARING ON 10-08-09/DOP/X: THE SUBPOENAED RECORDS ARE RELEASE TOTHE CARE AND CUSTODY OF THE DEFENSE COUNSEL, KENYETTE JONES, AND ARE ORDERED RETURNED UPON MAKING COPIES/
/CAL:TO SET/CONTD ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE/CTORD:A REPRESENTATIVE FROM METRO PCSTO APPEAR BEFORE THIS COURT/OSC1:AUGUST 25, 2009 AT 9:00 A,M, IN DEPARTMENT 12/DOP/

/TEXT:CONFL CNSL APPTD/CON:KENYETTE JONES/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DENOF ALLEG/FAWC/DEFTARR1/STWPX/987,2/BAIL:30000/SA2:2050 MISSION STREET INSAN FRANCISCO, CA/SAORD3/SAORD/DOP/CONTD:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/
/CAL:APD MOTION TO TERMINATE PROBATION EARLY/MO GRTD/CTORD:PROBATION IN #210452 IS HEREBY TERMINATED AS SUCCESSFUL/
/CAL:ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE METRO PCS SUBPOENAED RECORDS/CONT/
